recipes.name: Smoked Sausage Pasta
steps: brown some smoked sausage in a skillet.
Add heavy cream and Cajun seasoning; bring to a boil.
stir in Cheddar Cheese and seasoning. Add pasta to the sauce and toss.

recipes.name: Omelet
steps: Whisk the eggs with a pinch of salt.
Melt butter in a non-stick skillet over medium-low heat.
Pour in the eggs and stir gently with a spatula until they start to set.
Sprinkle cheese in the center, fold it over, and slide it onto your plate.

recipes.name: Fruit Yogurt Bowl
steps: Scoop your yogurt into a shallow bowl. Use the back of your spoon to smooth it out.
Arrange your sliced bananas and berries on one side of the bowl.
Pour the granola into the remaining space.
Drizzle your sweetener in a zigzag pattern over everything.

recipes.name: Homemade Chipotle Chicken Bowl
steps: Season chicken with salt, pepper, and spices. Sear in a pan for 5–6 minutes per side until charred. Let rest, then cube.
Warm up pre-cooked rice. Optionally squeeze half a lime over it and stir.
Layer the rice at the bottom of a large bowl. Add a scoop of beans next to the chicken.
Pile on your salsa, corn, and a generous handful of shredded cheese.
Top with sour cream or avocado slices if available.

recipes.name: Banana Bread
steps: Preheat oven to 175°C (350°F) and grease a loaf pan.
Mash the bananas in a large bowl with a fork until mostly smooth.
Stir in the melted butter, sugar, and the beaten egg until well combined.
Gently stir in the flour until no white streaks remain.
Pour the batter into the pan and bake for 45–55 minutes.
